# Requirements Quality Checklist: Update Course Capacity

**Purpose**: Validate requirement quality (completeness, clarity, consistency, measurability, and coverage) for the course-capacity feature specification.
**Created**: 2026-03-09
**Feature**: [/home/m_srnic/ece493/group_project/ECE493Group19/specs/001-update-course-capacity/spec.md](/home/m_srnic/ece493/group_project/ECE493Group19/specs/001-update-course-capacity/spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are role/permission requirements defined for each actor in the override workflow (requester, approver, administrator)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-006, Spec §FR-014, Spec §FR-015]
- [ ] CHK002 Are input constraints for capacity updates fully specified (allowed range, integer format, and any upper bound)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003, Gap]
- [ ] CHK003 Are requirements defined for unchanged-capacity submissions, including expected decision and user-facing outcome? [Completeness, Spec §Edge Cases, Gap]
- [ ] CHK004 Are requirements defined for all documented dependencies when they are unavailable (policy rules, enrollment data, workflow context)? [Completeness, Spec §Dependencies, Gap]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK005 Is "policy-compliant override" defined with objective decision criteria and required evidence fields? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-006, Ambiguity]
- [ ] CHK006 Is "offering has changed since open" defined with specific staleness conditions and comparison fields? [Clarity, Spec §FR-013, Ambiguity]
- [ ] CHK007 Is "failure message" specified with required content elements so outcomes are unambiguous for administrators? [Clarity, Spec §FR-008, Gap]
- [ ] CHK008 Is "success confirmation" defined with minimum required details beyond capacity and remaining seats (for example, offering identity or timestamp)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-009, Gap]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK009 Do override requirements remain consistent between clarifications and functional requirements regarding self-approval behavior? [Consistency, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §FR-015]
- [ ] CHK010 Do stale-submission requirements align between edge cases and functional requirements without conflicting outcomes? [Consistency, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-013]
- [ ] CHK011 Are alignment/protection requirements (FR-010/FR-011/FR-012) consistent with feature scope and non-functional requirements rather than duplicating implementation governance? [Consistency, Spec §FR-010, Spec §FR-011, Spec §FR-012, Ambiguity]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK012 Can each functional requirement be objectively verified from the specification without inferring missing acceptance criteria? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §Functional Requirements, Gap]
- [ ] CHK013 Are success thresholds fully measurable with explicit definitions of measurement windows, datasets, and environments? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001, Spec §SC-004, Ambiguity]
- [ ] CHK014 Are acceptance scenarios traceable one-to-one to FR-001 through FR-016, including override and stale-submission behaviors? [Traceability, Spec §User Scenarios, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK015 Are primary flow requirements complete from "open offering" through "confirmation" with no undocumented transitions? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 1, Spec §FR-001, Spec §FR-009]
- [ ] CHK016 Are alternate flow requirements complete for below-enrollment submissions with and without override approval? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 2, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-006, Spec §FR-014]
- [ ] CHK017 Are exception flow requirements complete for transaction failure points before and after validation? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §FR-008, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK018 Are recovery requirements defined for administrator actions after stale-submission rejection and update failure? [Recovery, Spec §FR-013, Spec §FR-008, Gap]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK019 Are boundary conditions for capacity values fully specified (equal to enrollment, very large values, and invalid numeric formats)? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-003, Gap]
- [ ] CHK020 Are concurrent-edit scenarios fully specified for more than two overlapping submissions and order-of-operations outcomes? [Edge Case, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §FR-013, Gap]
- [ ] CHK021 Are policy-variance scenarios covered where self-approval is disallowed after request initiation? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-015]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK022 Are performance requirements complete for all critical paths, including override decision flows and rejection flows? [Non-Functional, Spec §SC-001, Gap]
- [ ] CHK023 Are audit-retention requirements complete for storage, retrieval, and deletion/disposition behavior at end of retention? [Non-Functional, Spec §FR-016, Gap]
- [ ] CHK024 Are security/privacy requirements specified for override audit records (access control, sensitive-field handling, and exposure limits)? [Non-Functional, Spec §FR-016, Spec §Assumptions, Gap]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK025 Are assumptions explicitly linked to validating requirements so "authoritative enrollment" and "non-negative seats" are enforceable and testable? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions, Gap]
- [ ] CHK026 Are dependency contracts defined with measurable expectations for external policy rules and enrollment data freshness? [Dependency, Spec §Dependencies, Ambiguity]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK027 Is a stable requirement ID-to-scenario-to-success-criterion trace map defined to detect future conflicts and drift? [Traceability, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §User Scenarios, Spec §Success Criteria, Gap]
- [ ] CHK028 Are potentially conflicting intents between "reject stale submissions" and "complete update within 10 seconds" resolved with explicit precedence rules? [Conflict, Spec §FR-013, Spec §SC-001]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline.
- Each item evaluates requirement quality, not implementation behavior.
